title: dioscorea albicaulis
intro: Dioscorea albicaulis, also known as Rocky Mountain yam or mountain potato, is a perennial plant species in the yam family Dioscoreaceae that grows in the mountainous regions of North America. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Dioscorea albicaulis include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Dioscorea albicaulis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is also consumed raw or cooked as a starchy root vegetable.
